reviews.comment:
Caí en “cambio de turno”.. poco profesional que nos tengan esperando 15 minutos (además de la fila que se generó). Los repuestos de luces, por ejemplo, salen el doble que otros lugares. Muy raro todo.

(Translated by Google)
I fell for "shift change." It's unprofessional to have us wait 15 minutes (in addition to the resulting line). Replacement lights, for example, cost twice as much as other places. It's all very strange.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURrdVo3dkVnEAE
